docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,300.00 FILED BY GUTAROV, LEONID AS TO DEFENDANT SARKISOV, STAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-13-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY STAN SERKISOV IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. COSTS AWARDED BUT NO COSTS ACCRUED AS IFP GRANTED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-13-2017 - JUDGMENT.

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO THE DEFENDANT ON 11-13-17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM FILED BY GUTAROV, LEONID SARKISOV, STAN
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR, TRAN # W0518130D013, TAG # 035136 BY DEFENDANT SARKISOV, STAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUTAROV, LEONID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SARKISOV, STAN $3,600.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,600.00, INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT ARE STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $2400 AWARDED DUE TO DEFENDANT'S BAD FAITH FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SARKISOV, STAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-13-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-13-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF LEONID GUTAROV APPEARED. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT STAN SARKISOV. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUTAROV, LEONID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SARKISOV, STAN $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,320.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
